payload.answer: Admin SQL select-only mode permits read-only SELECT statements such as `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10`, while write/destructive statements such as `DELETE FROM memory_cards` are denied. No durable memory should be created from this fixture context.
citations: Input states: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is a test/debug fixture describing SQL permission behavior, not a durable user memory or personal fact.

details: Preserved the stated permission boundary: SELECT allowed, DELETE denied.
